properties.NOTES: Evacuation Warning in effect due to ongoing power shutoffs. Electricity service was discontinued indefinitely effective Sunday, September 1, 2024 at 12 p.m. PST. Be prepared to evacuate and seek alternative housing if circumstances worsen. Pack important documents, medications, and essential items. For updates, visit rpvca.gov
